workflow.name: Puber Refactor With Audit
workflow.description: Plan, audit, implement, review, fix, and conservatively clean up a Puber Android refactor or migration.

transition_groups.description: Start Puber refactor or migration planning from the task body.
Audited plan is ready; user approval required before implementation.
More implementation steps remain; continue in the same session.
Implementation is complete and needs read-only review.
Review found issues; user approval required before fixes.
Fix pass completed; review again.
Planning or audit is blocked by missing context, access, or user input.
Implementation is blocked by missing input, unsafe state, or verification failure.
Review is blocked by missing context or verification.
Fixing is blocked by missing input, unsafe state, or verification failure.
Review passed; run mandatory compliance review before cleanup.
Cleanup report is ready; finish the task.
Compliance review passed; create or update the task pull request before cleanup.
Compliance review found violations; user approval required before fixes.
Compliance review is blocked by missing or contradictory required sources.
PR exists; monitor GitHub checks when available.
PR is intentionally not applicable because there are no repository changes; run cleanup.
PR creation or update is blocked by git state, auth, remote, branch, or unsafe repository state.
PR checks passed or are intentionally skipped; run conservative cleanup.
PR checks failed due to task changes; user approval required before fixes.
CI monitoring is blocked by GitHub access, missing check data, or unsafe repository state.

edges.prompt_template:
Run the Puber refactor/migration planning flow for this Kent task.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Use .kent/commands/refactor-start.md for refactors and .kent/commands/migration-start.md for migrations, based on the task body. Create an explicit .todo/refactor-<name> or .todo/migration-<name> workspace; do not infer or create .todo/.current.

Analyze scope with project-local agents only, produce plan.md, and do not implement production code yet. If the command text asks for user confirmation, satisfy this workflow by stopping at the implement transition with a clear plan summary.

Complete with implement when an auditable plan is ready and provide workspace_path, plan_path, and audit_report. Complete with blocked if required context or product input is unavailable, and provide blocker_reason.

Implement the approved Puber refactor or migration plan.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Use the explicit workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}} and plan {{.Params.plan_path}}; do not infer .todo/.current. Execute one next unchecked step at a time, preserving compilation after each step. Use ./tools/agentw in .kent/worktrees and ./gradlew in the main checkout.

If more unchecked steps remain, complete with continue_implementation and provide workspace_path plus plan_path again. If all implementation steps are complete, complete with review and provide workspace_path, plan_path, audit_report, changed_files, and verification_summary. Complete with blocked on unresolved blockers and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Path to the explicit .todo/refactor-* or .todo/migration-* workspace created by planning.
Path to the generated plan.md inside the workspace.
Planning audit summary, risk notes, and user-facing implementation constraints.

edges.prompt_template: Continue the approved Puber refactor or migration plan from {{.Params.plan_path}} in workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}}. Execute the next unchecked step, verify narrowly, update plan.md, and complete with continue_implementation, review, or blocked as appropriate.

parameters.description: Path to the explicit .todo/refactor-* or .todo/migration-* workspace.
Path to the plan.md being executed.

edges.prompt_template:
Review the Puber refactor or migration implementation read-only.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Compare changes against {{.Params.plan_path}}, audit risks, AGENTS.md architecture rules, and {{.Params.verification_summary}}. Do not edit files in this node.

Complete with done if accepted, needs_changes if fixes are required and provide workspace_path, review_report, and changed_files, or blocked if review cannot complete and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Path to the explicit .todo/refactor-* or .todo/migration-* workspace.
Path to the plan.md being executed.
Planning audit summary and known risks.
Newline-separated or comma-separated list of files changed by implementation.
Commands run and their pass/fail results.

edges.prompt_template:
Fix the Puber refactor or migration review findings.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Apply only the fixes requested in {{.Params.review_report}} inside {{.Params.workspace_path}}. Verify narrowly, then complete with review and provide workspace_path, review_report, and changed_files. Complete with blocked if unsafe or missing input and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the implementation to fix.
Concrete review findings to fix.
Files changed so far and relevant to the fix pass.

edges.prompt_template: Re-review the fixed Puber refactor or migration. Use {{.Params.review_report}} and {{.Params.changed_files}} as context. Complete with done, needs_changes, or blocked.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the fixed implementation.
Original review findings and fix summary.
Files changed by the implementation and fix pass.
Why planning or audit cannot continue, in the task language when practical.
Why implementation cannot continue, in the task language when practical.
Why review cannot complete, in the task language when practical.
Why fixing cannot continue, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template:
Run mandatory Puber Compliance Review before cleanup.

Read .kent/commands/compliance-review.md, .kent/project-contract.md, and AGENTS.md first. Reviewed scope: completed refactor/migration in workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}}. Changed files: {{.Params.changed_files}}. Review only compliance with task requirements, plan/design/specs, AGENTS.md, and workflow contract. Do not edit files.

Complete with done and provide compliance_report when no compliance violations are found. Complete with needs_changes and provide workspace_path plus compliance_report when fixes are required. Complete with blocked and provide blocker_reason if required sources are missing or contradictory.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the implementation to fix.
Files changed so far and relevant to the fix pass.
Summary of cleanup performed or deliberately skipped.

edges.prompt_template:
Create or update the Puber pull request for this completed task.

Read .kent/project-contract.md, .kent/commands/ship-pr.md, and AGENTS.md first. Compliance result: {{.Params.compliance_report}}.

If this task produced repository changes, commit only task-related files, push the current task branch to origin, and create or update a GitHub PR. Do not merge the PR. Do not push directly to master/main. If there are no repository changes and the task is report-only or smoke-only, complete with done and provide pr_report explaining why PR is not applicable.

Complete with monitor_ci when a PR exists and provide pr_url, branch_name, and workspace_path. Complete with done only for PR-not-applicable/no-diff cases and provide pr_report. Complete with blocked if PR creation/update cannot be completed safely and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Compliance review report, including rule sources checked and any findings.

edges.prompt_template:
Fix Puber refactor/migration compliance violations only.

Read .kent/project-contract.md and .kent/commands/compliance-review.md first. Apply only the minimum changes required by compliance findings in {{.Params.compliance_report}} for workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}}. Verify narrowly, then complete with review and provide workspace_path, review_report, and changed_files. Complete with blocked and provide blocker_reason if unsafe or missing input.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the implementation to fix.
Compliance review report, including rule sources checked and any findings.
Why compliance review cannot complete, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template:
Monitor Puber PR checks.

Read .kent/project-contract.md and AGENTS.md first. Inspect PR {{.Params.pr_url}} on branch {{.Params.branch_name}}. Use GitHub CLI when available. Do not merge the PR. Do not push new commits from this node.

Complete with done if CI/checks pass, are absent, or are intentionally skipped with a clear reason; provide ci_report and pr_url. Complete with needs_changes if CI failed due to task changes and provide workspace_path plus ci_report. Complete with blocked if checks cannot be inspected and the risk cannot be accepted; provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: URL of the created or updated pull request.
Name of the pushed task branch.
Path to the task workspace or worktree used for PR creation.

edges.prompt_template:
Run conservative Puber task cleanup after PR was determined not applicable.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/cleanup-task.md. PR report: {{.Params.pr_report}}. Do not delete any worktree containing unpushed or uncommitted user changes. Complete with done and provide cleanup_report.

parameters.description: Why no pull request was created or updated.
Why PR creation/update cannot complete, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template:
Run conservative Puber task cleanup after PR/CI.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/cleanup-task.md. PR: {{.Params.pr_url}}. CI report: {{.Params.ci_report}}. Do not delete any worktree containing unpushed or uncommitted user changes. Complete with done and provide cleanup_report.

parameters.description: CI/check status report, including failures, skipped checks, or accepted absent checks.
URL of the created or updated pull request.

edges.prompt_template:
Fix Puber refactor/migration CI failures only.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Apply only the minimum changes required by CI report {{.Params.ci_report}} in workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}}. Verify narrowly, then complete with review and provide workspace_path, review_report, and changed_files. Complete with blocked and provide blocker_reason if unsafe or missing input.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the implementation to fix.
CI/check status report, including failures, skipped checks, or accepted absent checks.
Why CI monitoring cannot complete, in the task language when practical.
